about.title: About Us
about.p1: Fruitify is committed to delivering fresh, high-quality fruits that are carefully selected for their taste, freshness, and nutritional value. We believe that healthy living starts with fresh food, which is why we focus on providing fruits that you can trust and enjoy every day.
about.p2: Our goal is to make healthy eating simple, convenient, and accessible for everyone by bringing farm-fresh goodness closer to you. At Fruitify, we prioritize quality, freshness, and customer satisfaction in every order.
about.feature1_desc: Directly sourced from nature's best farms.
about.feature2_desc: Each fruit is hand-inspected for perfection.
about.feature3_desc: Customer satisfaction is our ultimate goal.

shipping.title: Shipping Policy
shipping.areas_desc: We currently deliver across all major areas in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Express 2-hour delivery is available for Dubai only.
shipping.charges_desc: Standard delivery is free for orders above AED 100. For orders below AED 100, a flat fee of AED 15 applies.
shipping.timings_desc: Orders placed before 6:00 PM will be delivered on the same day. Orders after 6:00 PM will be delivered the next morning.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Fruitify, you agree to comply with our terms. All products are subject to availability. Prices may change without prior notice.
terms.section1_desc: You can cancel your order within 30 minutes of placing it through our app or support. Once the order is dispatched, cancellation is no longer possible.
terms.section2_desc: We strive for 100% freshness. Since fruits are natural products, slight variations in color and size may occur. If you receive damaged items, please report within 2 hours.
terms.section3_desc: All prices are inclusive of VAT where applicable. Delivery charges are extra unless specified. We accept major credit/debit cards and Cash on Delivery.
terms.section4_desc: We aim for timely delivery. However, delays due to traffic or weather conditions are sometimes unavoidable. We appreciate your patience.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy is important to us. We only collect information necessary to process your order and provide the best experience.
privacy.data_desc: We collect details like name, phone, and address solely for delivery and order updates. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.security_desc: We use industry-standard SSL encryption and secure payment gateways to ensure your sensitive information is always protected.
privacy.cookies_desc: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and remember your preferences for your next visit.
privacy.contact_desc: If you have any questions regarding your data, feel free to reach out to our support team.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question? We're here to help you 24/7.
